creator: rodrigc@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Patches for kern/113266 (which look related to this bug) 
were committed to CURRENT 2 weeks ago. 
Submitting bug reports for 2 month old CURRENT is not too useful.... 
it is better to e-mail freebsd-current@freebsd.org, since CURRENT 
is a moving target.
